# Step 02 — PR List (Approver View)

**Persona:** Approver (HOD / FC / GM / Owner)
**Module:** 3
**Section:** 3.2
**Route:** `/procurement/purchase-request`
**Parent Flow:** Approver — Review & Approve PR

---

## 1. Access Path

**Sidebar navigation:** Procurement → Purchase Request

The PR List is the standard procurement list, scoped by role. HOD sees only PRs from their own department (filtered by `procurement.purchase_request.view_department`). FC, GM, and Owner see PRs from all departments.

---

## 2. Flow Position

```mermaid
graph TD
    myapproval["1. My Approval Dashboard"] --> list["2. PR List"]
    list --> detail["3. PR Detail"]
    detail --> edit["4. Edit Mode - Approved Qty"]
    edit -->|Approve| approved(["PR Approved"])
    edit -->|Reject| rejected(["PR Rejected"])
    edit -->|Send for Review| review(["PR Returned"])
    style list fill:#1a56db,color:#fff,stroke:#1a56db
```

---

## 3. Screen Layout

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ CARMEN  ≡  Procurement › Purchase Request                            [user ▾]  │
├──────────────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ My Approval  │  Purchase Request  [38]                                          │
│ Purchase Req │  Manage purchase requests for your business.                     │
│ Purchase Ord │                                                                  │
│ …            │  [Search…]  [My Pending]  [All Documents]   [All Stage ▾]       │
│              │                               [Status ▾]   [Filter ≡]  [⊞] [≡] │
│              │                                                                  │
│              │  PR Ref     Date       Type   Stage    Status   Requester        │
│              │             Desc.                               Dept.    Total   │
│              │  PR2026…    2026-04-07 HOD    ——       [badge]  ดีfn    5.00    │
│              │             After (HOD) วัลภา…                  G&B    THB      │
│              │  PR2026…    2026-04-07 HOD    ——       [badge]  ดีfn    5.00    │
│              │  …                                                               │
│              │  Showing 1–10 of 38              [< 1 2 3 4 >]   [rows/page]    │
└──────────────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

## 4. Filter Controls

| Control | Type | Default | Options |
|---------|------|---------|---------|
| Search | Text input | Empty | Free text; filters PR ref, requestor name |
| My Pending / All Documents | Toggle buttons | My Pending | Mutually exclusive |
| All Stage ▾ | Dropdown (My Pending mode) | All Stage | All Stage, Request Creation, Department Approval, Purchasing Review, Finance Review, Final Approval, Completed |
| Status ▾ | Dropdown (All Documents mode) | All Status | All Status, Draft, Submitted, In Progress, Approved, Rejected, Cancelled |
| Filter ≡ | Panel toggle | Closed | Opens right-side filter panel (Date range, Status, Workflow, Department, Requester) |
| View toggle | Icon buttons | Table | Table / Card view |

---

## 5. List Columns

| Column | Edit Permission | Description | Remark |
|--------|-----------------|-------------|--------|
| PR Ref | View Only | PR reference number (PR-YYYYMM-NNNN format); blue button | Clicking opens PR Detail |
| Date | View Only | PR creation date | YYYY-MM-DD format |
| Type | View Only | Document type (HOD / Asset / Purchase) | HOD = created by HOD-level requestor |
| Stage | View Only | Current workflow stage icon/indicator | Visual stepper dots |
| Status | View Only | Workflow status badge | Colour-coded: orange = IN PROGRESS, green = Completed/Approved |
| Requester / Description | View Only | Two-line cell: requestor name (top), description/notes (bottom) | Long text truncated |
| Department | View Only | Department that created the PR | Guest Service and Bell Staff observed |
| Total | View Only | PR grand total in local currency | Numeric |
| Currency | View Only | Currency code | THB observed |
| Delivery Date | View Only | Requested delivery date | YYYY-MM-DD |

---

## 6. Action Buttons

| Button | Color | Type | Enabled When | Behaviour |
|--------|-------|------|--------------|-----------|
| PR Ref (blue text) | Blue | Button | Always | Opens PR Detail (step-03) |
| My Pending | Primary | Toggle | Always | Shows only PRs pending this approver's action |
| All Documents | Outline | Toggle | Always | Shows all accessible PRs |
| All Stage ▾ | Neutral | Dropdown | My Pending mode | Filters by workflow stage |
| Status ▾ | Neutral | Dropdown | All Documents mode | Filters by PR status |
| Filter ≡ | Neutral | Panel | Always | Opens advanced filter panel |

No inline row action buttons (Approve/Reject/Return) exist in the list view.

---

## 7. My Pending vs All Documents Behaviour

| Mode | PRs Shown | Stage Filter | Status Filter |
|------|-----------|--------------|---------------|
| My Pending (default) | PRs requiring this approver's action, at current stage | Available | Hidden |
| All Documents | All PRs visible to this role (HOD = own dept only) | Hidden | Available |

**HOD-specific:** Badge count in sidebar ("Purchase Request 38") reflects HOD department scope, not system total.

---

## 8. Business Rules

| # | Rule | FR Reference |
|---|------|-------------|
| BR-01 | Default view is My Pending; shows only actionable PRs | FR-PR-009 |
| BR-02 | HOD is limited to own department PRs by RBAC | FR-PR-009 |
| BR-03 | FC, GM, Owner see all departments | FR-PR-009 |
| BR-04 | Stage filter only available in My Pending mode | FR-PR-009 |
| BR-05 | Status filter only available in All Documents mode | FR-PR-009 |
| BR-06 | Pagination default is 10 rows per page | FR-PR-009 |
| BR-07 | PR numbers are buttons that navigate to PR Detail | FR-PR-010 |

---

## 9. Edge Cases

| Scenario | System Behaviour |
|----------|-----------------|
| HOD switches to All Documents — sees 0 other-dept PRs | All Documents still filtered to HOD's department |
| No PRs match My Pending filter | Empty list with "No records" state |
| PR actioned by another approver while HOD views list | List refresh removes the PR from My Pending |
| Search returns no results | Empty list; no error |
| PR count badge in sidebar differs from list count | Possible race condition; refresh syncs counts |
| All Stage filter set to specific stage, then switching to All Documents | Stage filter hidden; All Documents shows all statuses |

---

## 10. Navigation

| Action | Destination |
|--------|------------|
| Click PR Ref number | step-03 PR Detail |
| Click My Approval in sidebar | step-01 My Approval Dashboard |
| Click Filter ≡ | Filter panel opens (same page) |

---

## 11. API Endpoints

| Method | Endpoint | Purpose |
|--------|----------|---------|
| GET | `/api/procurement/purchase-request` | Fetch PR list (with role-based scope) |
| GET | `/api/procurement/purchase-request?filter=my_pending` | My Pending filter |
| GET | `/api/procurement/purchase-request?stage=...` | Stage filter |

---
